raw.subject: Your Rustburg page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Customer safety is a top priority for you, evident in your Facebook post about a life-threatening situation on the road.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which can make it harder for people to find and contact you when they need emergency towing services.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that includes an emergency call CTA, a service list, and a service area map to help you reach more customers.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/green-speed-towing-rustburg

Let's discuss how a professional website can help you grow your business. For local businesses like yours, I offer a flat fee that's easy on the budget.
